hero.subtitle: Expert team tours and custom itineraries for global travelers seeking authentic Beijing experiences

about.title: About Four Seasons Fortune
about.description: Beijing Four Seasons Fortune Travel has been crafting exceptional Beijing experiences for over a decade. We know every hutong alley and palace hall, dedicated to providing professional, attentive, and heartfelt travel services for visitors from around the world. Our bilingual Chinese-English guides ensure seamless communication for all international travelers.

teamTours.title: Group Tours
teamTours.subtitle: 10 Years Licensed Agency, Quality Guaranteed
teamTours.description: With 10 years of expertise in Beijing tourism, we offer expertly curated classic routes with professional guides, perfect for family trips, corporate team building, and educational tours. Daily departures — book anytime, travel anytime. All tickets and transport included.
teamTours.moreRoutes: More classic routes available, such as in-depth Forbidden City & Great Wall tour, Beijing culture half-day tour, Temple of Heaven & Summer Palace day tour, welcome to inquire

itineraries.name: Beijing Panorama 5-Day Tour
itineraries.included: All transportation, 4 nights accommodation (4-star), 9 lunches + 4 breakfasts, All entrance fees, Professional guide
itineraries.desc: Deep dive into Beijing's finest with 5 days and 4 nights. From the grandeur of the Forbidden City to the magnificence of the Great Wall, from the charm of hutongs to the poetry of imperial gardens — explore Beijing's unmissable landmarks and experience authentic Beijing culture.
itineraries.meals: 4 breakfasts, 9 lunches (Imperial cuisine, Peking duck feast, Beijing Zhajiangmian, Beijing snacks)
itineraries.hotel: Recommended 4-star hotel near East Third Ring Road or Wangfujing, convenient metro access

itinerary.title: Imperial Arrival
itinerary.content: Airport pickup → Hotel check-in → Tiananmen Square → Forbidden City (3hr in-depth tour) → Tiananmen Tower night view → Qianmen Street

itinerary.title: Great Wall Adventure
itinerary.content: Badaling Great Wall (cable car to summit) → Juyongguan Pass view → Ming Tombs Sacred Way → Bird's Nest & Water Cube night view

itinerary.title: Garden Paradise
itinerary.content: Summer Palace (Kunming Lake boat ride, Long Corridor) → Old Summer Palace ruins → Peking University or Tsinghua photo stop → Zhongguancun

itinerary.title: Ancient Capital
itinerary.content: Temple of Heaven (Prayer Hall, Echo Wall) → Beihai Park (White Pagoda) → Nanluoguxiang → Shichahai Hutong tour → Rickshaw → Prince Gong's Mansion → Houhai bar street

itinerary.title: Beijing Experience
itinerary.content: Free time (Wangfujing, SKP shopping) → Airport/Station drop-off

itineraries.name: Forbidden City & Great Wall Day Tour
itineraries.included: All entrance fees, Lunch (Imperial-style cuisine), Expert guide, Rickshaw experience, Round-trip transport
itineraries.desc: Experience Beijing's dual charm in one day. Explore 600 years of Forbidden City history in the morning, climb the Great Wall as a true hero in the afternoon, and enjoy the Bird's Nest night view in the evening.
itineraries.meals: Lunch included (Peking duck or traditional Zhajiangmian)

itinerary.title: Into the Forbidden City
itinerary.content: Tiananmen Square → Meridian Gate → Hall of Supreme Harmony → Central Axis → Palace of Heavenly Purity → Imperial Garden → Gate of Divine Might

itinerary.title: Great Wall Hero
itinerary.content: Drive to Badaling (1.5hr highway) → Cable car to summit → Walk from North 1 to North 8 tower → Return

itinerary.title: Beijing Night Scene
itinerary.content: Drive through Chang'an Avenue → Bird's Nest & Water Cube exterior → Return to city

itineraries.name: Hutong Culture Half-Day Tour
itineraries.included: Rickshaw experience, Courtyard home visit, Beijing snacks, Tea ceremony, Expert guide
itineraries.desc: Deep dive into old Beijing's authentic life. Glide through hutongs by rickshaw, listen to fascinating stories from longtime residents, visit preserved courtyard homes, and taste the most genuine Beijing snacks.
itineraries.meals: Authentic Beijing snacks included (douzhi, jiaoyuan, aiwowo, ludagun, etc.)

itinerary.title: Hutong Exploration
itinerary.content: Meet at Shichahai → Yinding Bridge → Prince Gong's Mansion → Nanluoguxiang → Rickshaw through hutongs → Courtyard family visit → Tea break

itineraries.name: Temple of Heaven & Summer Palace Day Tour
itineraries.included: All entrance fees, Lunch, Boat ride, Expert guide, Round-trip transport
itineraries.desc: The perfect combination of imperial gardens and sacred sites. Feel the philosophy of harmony between heaven and man at the Temple of Heaven in the morning, stroll along Kunming Lake at the Summer Palace in the afternoon, and appreciate the pinnacle of Chinese garden art.
itineraries.meals: Lunch included (Imperial-style cuisine inside Summer Palace)

itinerary.title: Sacred Grounds
itinerary.content: East Gate of Temple of Heaven → Prayer Hall (exterior) → Echo Wall → Circular Mound Altar → Seven-Star Hall → Covered Walkway → Zhaigong

itinerary.title: Kunming Lake
itinerary.content: North Gate of Summer Palace → Suzhou Street → Four Great Universes → Kunming Lake boat ride → Long Corridor painting gallery

itinerary.title: Western Hills
itinerary.content: Foxiang Pavilion (optional climb) → Longevity Hill → Old Summer Palace ruins (exterior) → Peking University & Tsinghua photo stop

customTours.title: Custom Tours
customTours.subtitle: Exclusive itinerary, personalized experience
customTours.description: Exclusive itineraries tailored to your interests, time, and budget. Private tours, corporate team building, family trips, honeymoons — we provide personalized service to make your Beijing trip unique.

itineraries.name: Family & Kids Tour
itineraries.included: Custom itinerary, Family guide, Child tickets, Specialty meals, All transportation
itineraries.desc: Safe, fun, and educational itinerary for the whole family. Our professional children's guides bring history alive with engaging stories at the Forbidden City. The Science Museum's interactive exhibits make learning exciting, and the Aquarium's underwater tunnel leaves kids amazed.
itineraries.meals: Specialty family meals (traditional copper hotpot, Zhajiangmian DIY workshop)
itineraries.hotel: Recommended family suites in Sanlitun or Guomao area, near shopping districts

itinerary.title: Imperial Introduction
itinerary.content: Pickup → Forbidden City kids version (2.5hr) → Jingshan Park panoramic view → Qianmen Street

itinerary.title: Great Wall Heroes
itinerary.content: Badaling Great Wall (cable car) → Great Wall Museum → China Science & Technology Museum kids zone → Bird's Nest night view

itinerary.title: Nature Exploration
itinerary.content: Beijing Zoo (Panda Hall) → Aquarium (underwater tunnel) → Beijing Planetarium

itinerary.title: Campus & Culture
itinerary.content: Peking University or Tsinghua (photo stop) → Old Summer Palace ruins → Hutong rickshaw → Courtyard calligraphy experience

itinerary.title: Happy Return
itinerary.content: Free time (SKP, China World Mall) → Airport/Station drop-off

itineraries.name: Corporate Team Building
itineraries.included: Professional coach, Team building facilities, All meals, Meeting room, Accommodation, Transport
itineraries.desc: Combine outdoor adventures with cultural experiences. Build team spirit on Great Wall hikes, strengthen bonds through team challenges, create lasting memories through cultural experiences, and align direction through meeting sessions.
itineraries.meals: All meals included (Peking duck feast, Imperial cuisine, BBQ buffet)
itineraries.hotel: Recommended resort or conference hotel with full meeting facilities

itinerary.title: Ice Breaking
itinerary.content:
AM: Pickup → Registration → Opening ceremony
PM: Outdoor challenges (Frisbee, Building Tower) → Team competitions
Evening: Welcome Peking duck dinner

itinerary.title: Peak Challenge
itinerary.content:
AM: Great Wall hiking orientation (team missions)
PM: Cultural experience (Cloisonné making / Peking Opera mask DIY)
Evening: Free time or meeting summary

itinerary.title: Unity & Closure
itinerary.content:
AM: Hutong cultural exploration (treasure hunt)
Noon: Closing ceremony & awards
PM: Departure

itineraries.name: Private Custom Tour
itineraries.included: Dedicated driver+guide, Private vehicle, Flexible schedule, Optional premium hotel
itineraries.desc: Completely customized based on your interests and schedule. Want to go somewhere? Stay as long as you like? Eat what you want? You decide. Dedicated driver and guide service lets you focus on enjoying the journey.
itineraries.meals: Recommendations based on your taste, meals not included
itineraries.hotel: Options: Traditional courtyard inn, 5-star hotel, or boutique design hotel

itinerary.title: Your Trip, Your Way
itinerary.content:
Customized based on your interests:
• Early morning flag ceremony
• In-depth Forbidden City tour
• Great Wall sunset
• Houhai bar street at night
• Michelin-starred restaurant
• More experiences await...

destinations.title: Featured Destinations
destinations.subtitle: Beijing, a city with 3,000 years of history...
destinations.intro: Beijing, a city with 3,000 years of history, is China's political, cultural, international exchange, and technological innovation center. Here you'll find the world's largest palace complex — the Forbidden City, the magnificent Great Wall stretching thousands of miles, the Summer Palace — the most beautiful imperial garden, and the charming old Beijing hutongs full of local life.

items.name: Forbidden City
items.desc: The majesty of the Purple Forbidden City
items.detail: The world's largest and best-preserved wooden-structure ancient building complex, the imperial palace of 24 emperors during the Ming and Qing dynasties. Covering 720,000 square meters with about 150,000 square meters of floor space, it contains over 70 palaces and 9,000+ rooms.
highlights: Hall of Supreme Harmony (emperor's grand ceremonies)

items.name: Great Wall
items.desc: A wonder of the world, breathtaking vistas
items.detail: Badaling Great Wall is the most representative section of the Ming Great Wall and the first to open to tourists. The wall averages 7.8 meters high and about 5 meters wide, wide enough for ten people or five horses to pass abreast.

items.name: Temple of Heaven
items.desc: Sacred ground for prayer and harmony
items.detail: The Temple of Heaven was where emperors of the Ming and Qing dynasties worshipped heaven and prayed for harvest. Covering about 2.73 million square meters, its main buildings include the Hall of Prayer for Good Harvests, Circular Mound Altar, and Echo Wall. Listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1998.
highlights: Hall of Prayer for Good Harvests

items.name: Hutongs
items.detail: Hutongs are Beijing's lifelines and the microcosm of old Beijing life. The Shichahai area preserves the most complete historical neighborhood, where you can ride rickshaws through the alleys while listening to fascinating stories and historical legends from longtime residents.
highlights: Prince Gong's Mansion (He Shen's former residence)
items.bestTime: Start in afternoon, Houhai bar street in evening

items.name: Summer Palace
items.desc: Poetic beauty of an imperial garden
items.detail: The Summer Palace is China's largest existing imperial garden, integrating the finest elements of Jiangnan gardens with Kunming Lake and Longevity Hill. Listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1998, it's often called the Museum of Imperial Gardens.

items.name: Beihai Park
items.desc: Classic imperial garden by the lake
items.detail: Beihai Park is China's oldest existing imperial garden with nearly a thousand years of history. The White Dagoba stands atop Qionghua Island, making it an iconic Beijing landmark. The park also features the Five-Dragon Pavilion, Haopuzhengjia, and the Nine-Dragon Wall.
items.bestTime: 1-2 hours, combinable with hutong day tour
